sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 45

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 45:1
items.html: (to the question) The awakening of the newborn to receive its Lights from above downward, after it has grown, is what causes the inversion of the hinges in the womb. For at the time of the Nukva's Gadlut, when she attained her AHP [Awzen, Hotem, Peh], she attained also the AHP of the discernments of the Yesod and womb in her, which are the second door and hinge; and then the first door and hinge became discernments of the Kelim [vessels] of the Panim [face] in her, being discernments of the GE [Galgalta ve Eynaim] of the Yesod, and the door and hinge of Gadlut became discernments of Kelim of Achoraim [posterior] — similar to the new NHY [Netzah, Hod, Yesod], which are the collective AHP restored to the Partzuf, which become in it only Kelim of Achoraim: for from the former GE of the time of Katnut, the Rosh and Toch of the Partzuf were made, which are the discernment of the Panim, and the new AHP became NHY. So is the matter here in the Yesod: the door and hinge of Katnut became the upper one, the discernments of Rosh and Toch of the Yesod, and the door and hinge of Gadlut became the lower one, namely the discernments of NHY of the Yesod. Now, when the Nukva again renewed the discernment of Katnut present in the first door and hinge, that door and hinge went back down to the discernment of end and conclusion — namely, to the NHY of the Yesod, as they were at the time of Katnut. And since she did this intentionally for the good of the newborn, this Katnut renewed in her detracts nothing from the discernment of Gadlut in her; hence the door and hinge of Gadlut are still found above, in all their purity from the forces of ending and Tzimtzum [restriction], as before. Thus the hinges were actually inverted: the very door and hinge that were in the closed Mem above — namely the first door and hinge, as above — have now been inverted and descended to the discernment of NHY below; and that second door and hinge, which at the time of the closed Mem were below, serving there only as the discernment of NHY, are now found above the first door and hinge, standing in the discernment of the Gadlut in it. And this is the secret of "her hinges were turned upon her." (p. 798, Item 95; and p. 790, beginning "And the matter")
